title: Jamaican Brussels Sprouts Fritters
description: A delicious and spicy twist on traditional fritters, featuring crispy Brussels sprouts and a hint of Jamaican flair.
instructions: In a food processor, combine the Brussels sprouts, sweet plantain, crispy fried onions, and Jamaican jerk seasoning. Process until coarsely chopped.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, breadcrumbs, eggs, and salt. Add the chopped Brussels sprouts mixture and stir until just combined.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the mixture into balls and flatten slightly into patties.
Place the fritters on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20-25 minutes, flipping halfway through.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
